headline: Does Caterpillar's 8% Dividend Hike Signal More Growth Ahead?
summary: CAT boosts its quarterly dividend 8% to $1.63, notching 32 straight years of hikes as Q1 revenues jumped 22% and backlog hit $62.7B.
